# IByteChannelTransport.CloseAsync method

Initiates an orderly (clean) close that each side can observe (R-7.2-t).

```csharp
public Task CloseAsync(string? reason = null)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| reason | An optional human-readable reason recorded on the close info. |

## Return Value

A task that completes once the close has been initiated and observed.
